title: CHANGELOG promotion [Unreleased] → [1.1.0]
predecessor: M35-T6 shipped 2026-04-20 (commit a966deb — 'docs(m35): M35 T6 — README + user-guide reconciliation sweep'). Root README.md reconciled against live M35 baseline: tests badge 1099 → 1162, Vitest 1033 → 1162, Playwright 8 → 11 specs, spec table expanded 8 → 11 rows, architecture tree 10 → 13 migrations + 60+ → 80+ IPC channels, command palette framing '15 intents' → '14 structured + complex_request fallback'. docs/user-guide/README.md rewritten with Phase 1–5 + Reference grouping + Cmd+K + Cmd+Shift+K keyboard-first primer + See-also cross-links. Zero code / zero tests. Unit baseline 1162 preserved. M35-T5 (3cffe29 demo walkthrough). M35-T4 (0f8b51c Phase 5 retrospective). M35-T3 (51393f8 audit view chips). M35-T2 (1108247 cross-milestone E2E). M35-T1 (b68d09b performance defaults held). M35-T0 (da4ce1f plan doc).
goal: Promote CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] section (accumulated M28 + M29 + M30 + M31 + M32 + M33 + M34 entries) into a new [1.1.0] release section dated 2026-04-20. Keep a Changelog format preserved throughout — Added / Changed / Fixed / Deprecated / Removed / Security category order maintained. Add a 'Phase 5 — Intelligence Layer' header above the consolidated section. Reset [Unreleased] to an empty scaffold ready for Phase 6 work. Pure documentation deliverable. Zero code / zero tests / zero IPC/bus/migrations.
acceptance: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] section promoted to [1.1.0] — 2026-04-20 with all accumulated M28-M34 entries preserved. Keep a Changelog (https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/) format: Added / Changed / Fixed / Deprecated / Removed / Security category ordering within the [1.1.0] section.
A 'Phase 5 — Intelligence Layer' header line sits above the [1.1.0] section as a narrative anchor for the release (mirrors any Phase 4 header that may exist above [1.0.0]).

[Unreleased] section reset to empty scaffold with the six category subheads (Added / Changed / Fixed / Deprecated / Removed / Security) present but body empty — ready for Phase 6 work to append entries in place.
Version + date line for [1.1.0] matches semver conventions: '## [1.1.0] — 2026-04-20' with en-dash.
Bottom-of-file version-link references updated: [Unreleased] now points to compare/v1.1.0...HEAD; [1.1.0] points to compare/v1.0.0...v1.1.0; [1.0.0] link preserved.
No entries lost in the promotion — every bullet that was under [Unreleased] on the predecessor commit lands under [1.1.0] with the same wording (or tightened wording, never dropped).
Zero code changes, zero IPC, zero bus events, zero migrations, zero tests. Pure markdown deliverable.
Atomic commit: docs(m35): M35 T7 — CHANGELOG [Unreleased] → [1.1.0].

Ledger commit: chore(loki): M35 T7 — commit ledger (<sha>) — roll orchestrator.json tasksCompleted 7 → 8, update pending.json T7 status pending → shipped, overwrite current-task.json to M35-T8 (version bump 1.0.0 → 1.1.0 + Phase 5 badge freeze unit test).
filesTouched: CHANGELOG.md (MODIFIED — promotion [Unreleased] → [1.1.0] + reset [Unreleased] scaffold + version-link refs)
carryForward: M35 T6 closed: root README.md + docs/user-guide/README.md reconciled. Tests badge 1099 → 1162, 8 → 11 specs, spec table expanded, architecture tree 10 → 13 migrations, command palette '15 intents' → '14 structured + complex_request fallback'. docs/user-guide/README.md now grouped by Phase + has keyboard-first primer + See-also. Commit a966deb. Zero tests. T6 is the 7th M35 task shipped; 4 remaining (T7-T10).

CHANGELOG.md currently exists with [Unreleased] accumulating M28 through M34 entries. Read it first, audit what's there, then promote — DO NOT invent entries that aren't already written; the accumulation was done task-by-task across M28-M34 as part of each milestone's T9/T11 documentation step.

Test baseline current at 1162 unit / 11 E2E specs / 12 Playwright cases (as of M35 T3). T8 version bump will pin this in unit tests. The CHANGELOG [1.1.0] section should mention the test baseline as a release-note bullet (e.g., 'ships with 1162 unit tests + 11 Playwright E2E specs' in Added or Changed).
Phase 5 badge FROZEN at 'Phase 5' through v1.1.0 release. Do not update any visible badge copy to 'Phase 6' — that's a Phase-6-T0 concern.

v1.0.0 shipped 2026-04-13 as the Phase 4 ship-readiness release (CLAUDE.md M27 marker). v1.1.0 is the Phase 5 Intelligence Layer release — additive (RAG + NLU + agentic + planner + copilot), zero breaking changes, minor version bump per semver.

ABI state at start of T7: Node (post M35 T6 — T6 was docs-only, no rebuild). T7 is a pure docs task — no ABI rebuild required. Next rebuild at T8 unit-test addition (Node) or T10 full verification (both).
Commit cadence: single docs(m35) atomic commit for the CHANGELOG promotion; single chore(loki) ledger commit. Both same session. Atomic + ledger cadence held T1-T6; T7 preserves it.
Scope boundary: NO re-authoring CHANGELOG entries that already exist; NO new code, NO new tests, NO new IPC/bus/migrations. Promotion + scaffold reset + link refs only. Target under 15 minutes.

Surprise watch: CHANGELOG.md may or may not have Phase headers in its current form. Check before adding — if a 'Phase 4 — Ship-Ready' header already sits above [1.0.0], mirror the style for Phase 5 above [1.1.0]. If no phase headers exist, introduce one per the plan doc §3 T7 row — add to [1.1.0] and leave [1.0.0] unchanged (backfilling older releases is out of scope for T7).
